Table of Contents

Class AgendaDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Represents a single availability window for a facility space on a given day of the week.

public class AgendaDTO
Inheritance
object
AgendaDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Used as the input/output model for AgendaService.ConfigurarAgenda. A space may have multiple AgendaDTO entries per day to model split availability windows. DiaSemana follows the DayOfWeek convention: 0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday. Note: windows that cross midnight (i.e., HoraHasta < HoraDesde) are not currently supported and will be rejected by the service.

Constructors

AgendaDTO() 

public AgendaDTO()

Properties

DiaSemana

Day of the week this window applies to (0 = Sunday, 6 = Saturday).

public int DiaSemana { get; set; }

Property Value

int

EspacioID

FK to the space whose availability this window defines.

public Guid EspacioID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

HoraDesde

Start of the availability window (inclusive).

public TimeSpan HoraDesde { get; set; }

Property Value

TimeSpan

HoraHasta

End of the availability window (exclusive). Must be greater than HoraDesde.

public TimeSpan HoraHasta { get; set; }

Property Value

TimeSpan
